title: alchemilla hybrida var. glaucescens
intro: Alchemilla hybrida var. glaucescens, commonly known as the silver-leaved lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, ulcers, and digestive issues. Its medicinal properties also provide various health benefits, including reducing swelling, soothing sore throats, and relieving menstrual cramps. Alchemilla hybrida var. glaucescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, or used as a topical cream or salve for external applications.
